name: No-Bake PB and Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the margarine, milk, sugar, peanut butter (about 2 big spoonfuls), and vanilla extract.
2. Cook over medium heat until it comes to a rolling boil. Boil for 1 minute while continuously stirring.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the rolled oats and cocoa powder.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto aluminum foil.
5. Allow to cool for a few minutes before enjoying.
